basic_details.job_title: RailTel Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: RailTel Corporation of India Limited (RCIL) - Navratna CPSE under Ministry of Railways
basic_details.post_name: L-I Engineer, L-II Engineer, L-III Engineer (Technical)
basic_details.job_location: Thiruvananthapuram / Kerala (may change as per project requirement)
basic_details.short_information: RCIL is recruiting 13 posts of L-I Engineer, L-II Engineer and L-III Engineer for KSITM Project with Graduation/PG in Science or Engineering and relevant cybersecurity certifications & experience, last date 22 June 2026.

important_dates.cut-off date for all eligibility: Last date of submission of application (22.06.2026)
important_dates.interview_date: Will be notified after the closing date

age_limit.details: Note: Age relaxation is subject to submission of a valid certificate. Cut-off date for age is 22.06.2026.

qualification.details: All mandatory educational/professional qualifications must be from recognized universities, autonomous institutes, or government-approved institutions in India. Only experience gained after obtaining the minimum required qualification will be considered for eligibility.

selection_process: Stage 1 Interview (date will be notified after closing date)
Stage 2 Medical Examination (by medical authority designated by RailTel)
Final Empanelment Subject to medical fitness and verification of all documents
Note: No travelling expenses will be paid to candidates for appearing in screening / interview / medical examination.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply offline only. No online application mode is available.
Download the application form (Annexure-I) from the official RailTel website: www.railtelindia.com
Fill the form completely and sign it; affix a self-attested passport size photograph.
Clearly mention the name of the post applied for on the application form (applications without post name will be rejected).
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents.
Superscribe the envelope as: "Application For Technical Personnel For Kerala State Information Technology Mission Project Of Railtel In Southern Region On Contract Basis."

Send by post/courier to reach on or before 22.06.2026 during office hours at: Territory Manager, RailTel Corporation of India Limited (Territory Office), First Floor, Eastern Entry Tower, Ernakulam Railway Station, KOCHI - 682016
Note: RailTel will not be responsible for any delay in receipt of the application. Applications received after the last date will not be considered.
important_instructions: Engagement is purely contractual - initially for 3 years; may be extended based on project requirements and performance; may be terminated earlier due to non-availability of work, unsatisfactory performance, or administrative reasons. Selected candidates must execute a Service Agreement for one year at the time of engagement. Failure to complete this period will attract a penalty of three months' gross salary in addition to the notice period. A mandatory notice period of three months is required prior to resignation. Candidates must not furnish false, tampered, or fabricated documents. Documents with overwriting or correction marks will not be accepted. No request for change of email ID or address submitted with the application will be entertained. Any corrigendum and updates will be published only on www.railtelindia.com. Call letters will be sent via email only. In case of any legal dispute, jurisdiction shall be Hyderabad. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. RTI applications will not be entertained until completion of the entire recruitment process. WARNING: Beware of touts/job racketeers. RailTel has not authorized any person or agency to act on its behalf. Rely only on www.railtelindia.com.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RailTel KSITM Project Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the offline application for RailTel KSITM Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 is 22 June 2026. All applications must physically reach the office of the Territory Manager, RailTel Corporation of India Limited, located at First Floor, Eastern Entry Tower, Ernakulam Railway Station, Kochi – 682016 on or before 22.06.2026 during office working hours. Any applications received after this deadline will not be considered under any circumstances, so candidates are strongly advised to send their documents well in advance through reliable post or courier services to avoid any transit delays.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in RailTel KSITM Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 13 posts have been announced for the RailTel KSITM Project Recruitment 2026, which includes 09 posts for L-I Engineer, 03 posts for L-II Engineer, and 01 post for L-III Engineer. It is important to note that the number of vacancies is tentative and subject to change depending upon the actual project requirements and operational needs of RailTel. Candidates should regularly check the official website for any updates regarding revisions in the number of posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary/CTC for RailTel KSITM Project Engineer posts in 2026?
faq.answer: The annual Cost to Company (CTC) offered for the RailTel KSITM Project Engineer posts in 2026 is ₹4,20,000 for L-I Engineer, ₹5,58,000 for L-II Engineer, and ₹18,00,000 for L-III Engineer. All positions come with an annual increment of 3% and the CTC is inclusive of Gratuity. This compensation package reflects the contractual nature of the engagement and is designed to attract experienced professionals for the specialized roles in the project.

faq.question: Q4. What is the contract period for RailTel KSITM Project Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The contract period for RailTel KSITM Project Engineer posts is initially for a period of 3 years from the date of joining. This contract may be extended further based on the requirements of the project and the satisfactory performance of the selected candidate. However, the contract can also be terminated earlier if there is non-availability of work, unsatisfactory performance, or due to any administrative reasons as decided by RailTel management.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for RailTel KSITM Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The prescribed age limit for RailTel KSITM Project Recruitment 2026 is a minimum of 24 years and a maximum of 50 years as on the cut-off date of 22.06.2026. The maximum age limit can go up to 55 years after considering all applicable relaxations. Relaxation in the upper age limit is provided as follows: 3 years for OBC candidates, 5 years for SC/ST candidates, and 10 years for PwBD candidates. Candidates must ensure they meet the age criteria as on the specified cut-off date.

faq.question: Q6. What qualifications and certifications are required for RailTel L-III Engineer post?
faq.answer: For the RailTel L-III Engineer post, candidates must possess Graduation or Post Graduation in Science or Engineering along with a minimum of 8 years of experience in Security Operations Centre (SOC), which should include at least 3 years as SOC Manager. Additionally, two mandatory certifications are required — one in Cyber Security (CISSP or CISM or CISA — any one) and another in Incident and Program Management (ITIL or PMP — any one). These stringent requirements ensure that only highly experienced and certified professionals are selected for this senior-level role.

faq.question: Q7. Is the RailTel KSITM Project recruitment a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the RailTel KSITM Project recruitment is not a permanent government job. The engagement is purely on a contractual basis and selected candidates will not be treated as regular employees of RailTel Corporation of India Limited. This is a fixed-term contractual position initially for 3 years which may be extended based on project needs and performance, but it does not carry the benefits or status associated with permanent government employment.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to apply for RailTel KSITM Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for RailTel KSITM Project Recruitment 2026 must attach self-attested copies of several important documents including Matriculation Certificate for age proof, all educational and professional qualification certificates, experience certificates or appointment letters supported by pay slips, caste/EWS/disability certificate (if applicable), a detailed CV with recent passport-size photograph, photo ID proof and address proof, and NOC from the present employer if currently working in Government or PSU. All original documents must be produced at the time of the interview for verification.

faq.question: Q9. How to apply for RailTel KSITM Project Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply offline only for the RailTel KSITM Project Engineer Recruitment 2026. They need to download Annexure-I from the official website www.railtelindia.com, fill it carefully, sign it, affix a recent passport-size photograph, attach all required self-attested documents, and superscribe the envelope with the necessary details. The completed application should then be sent by post or courier so that it reaches the Territory Manager, RailTel Corporation of India Limited, First Floor, Eastern Entry Tower, Ernakulam Railway Station, Kochi – 682016 on or before the last date of 22.06.2026.

faq.question: Q10. Will RailTel reimburse travel expenses for the interview?
faq.answer: RailTel will not pay or reimburse any travelling expenses to candidates for appearing in the screening process, interview, or medical examination. Candidates are required to attend all stages of the selection process at their own cost and arrangement. This is standard for this contractual recruitment drive, and no requests for reimbursement will be entertained by the organization.
